description: build the govd image (if absent) + (re)create + run the container, then wait for /health
rules: builds the image only when it is not already present
replaces any existing container by the same NAME (stop + rm, then run fresh)
binds the data volume so the provenance ledger persists across restarts
deploy report + build log to record_store
usage: Set CONTEXT_DIR (repo root with the Dockerfile). Optional IMAGE (cyberware:local), NAME (cyberware), PORT (5773), VOLUME (cyberware-govd), TOKEN_FILE (path to a file holding GOVD_MONITOR_TOKEN — read via cat at runtime, never a plaintext var). Output: deploy.json.
limitation: Needs a running Docker daemon. Destructive: removes any prior container by the same NAME (the data volume is preserved).
